descFull: Lightweight multi-format artifact registry. 13 formats: Docker, Maven, npm, PyPI, Cargo, Go, NuGet, RubyGems, Terraform, Conan, Ansible Galaxy, Dart Pub, and Raw. Single binary, zero dependencies, <100MB RAM.
